OBERONPRETENDER-DREAM_CONTRACT.title: The Dream Contract
OBERONPRETENDER-DREAM_CONTRACT.descripti: #At the start of each combat, enter the Storybook King. Each point of Debt you pay with NP at end of turn grants 10 Critical Stars (up to 3 per turn).
OBERONPRETENDER-DREAM_CONTRACT.flavor: Sign here, and the best dream of your life is yours — tonight. The bill comes at dawn.
OBERONPRETENDER-CHRONICLE_OF_AVALON.desc: #Gain Bond from victories, events, shops and rest sites. Each level grants permanent gifts (Max HP, starting NP Charge and Block). At Bond 7 also start combats with 20 Critical Stars; the Bond 10 capstone starts each combat with 2 Overcharge Blessing.
OBERONPRETENDER-CHRONICLE_OF_AVALON.flav: The history of the fairy land, written by one who lied his way through every page of it.
OBERONPRETENDER-FORGET_ME_NOT_OF_AUTUMN_: #At card rewards, you may give up the card to roll for a duplicate. A duplicate raises your NP level, boosting your NP cards by 15% per level.
The flower that remembers forgotten names. Each one summoned is another self of the Fae King, recalled.
OBERONPRETENDER-BOOK_OF_DREAMS_END.title: The Book of Dream's End
OBERONPRETENDER-BOOK_OF_DREAMS_END.descr: #Each point of Debt you pay with NP grants 10 Critical Stars (up to 5 per turn). The first unpaid Debt each turn no longer costs you HP (only gains interest). Your credit limit rises to 10.
OBERONPRETENDER-BOOK_OF_DREAMS_END.flavo: The last page of every fairy tale, where the king finally tells the truth — and the world ends.
OBERONPRETENDER-USURERS_PURSE.title: Usurer's Purse
OBERONPRETENDER-USURERS_PURSE.descriptio: #Your Loan cards grant 10 additional Critical Stars.
OBERONPRETENDER-USURERS_PURSE.flavor: Every coin lent comes back with a glittering little extra. It is never a gift.
OBERONPRETENDER-HAWK_MOTH.title: Hawk Moth
OBERONPRETENDER-HAWK_MOTH.description: #The first Quick card you play each turn: draw 1.
OBERONPRETENDER-HAWK_MOTH.flavor: He rides it at 130 km/h when no one is watching. Especially then.
OBERONPRETENDER-PRINCES_FLOWER_CROWN.des: #The first Loan card you play each combat does not generate Debt.
OBERONPRETENDER-PRINCES_FLOWER_CROWN.fla: The first dose is free. That is how every prince becomes a debtor.
OBERONPRETENDER-MIDSUMMER_NIGHTS_DREAM_E: #You are immune to Curse. The first Weak, Frail or Vulnerable you would receive each combat is negated.
Lord, what fools these mortals be. None of it touches a mind already dreaming.
#When you play an NP card, remove 2 points of Debt.
A single feather from a butterfly wing, signed in dream. The dream, unfurled, settles the accounts.
OBERONPRETENDER-CLOCK_OF_DAWN.title: Clock of Dawn
OBERONPRETENDER-CLOCK_OF_DAWN.descriptio: #At the start of combats against an Elite or Boss: gain 40 NP Charge and Debt 1.
OBERONPRETENDER-CLOCK_OF_DAWN.flavor: The morning dose arrives on its own. So does the morning bill.
OBERONPRETENDER-HOLY_GRAIL_OF_THE_FAE.de: #Gain 15 Max HP. While held, your Bond can reach level 12 and your NP level can reach 6.
OBERONPRETENDER-HOLY_GRAIL_OF_THE_FAE.fl: A wish-granting cup for a king who already has everything he wants — and wants the world gone anyway.
